properties.name: okapi.purger.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox purger is enabled.

properties.name: okapi.purger.retention-days
properties.description: How many days to keep delivered entries before purging.

properties.name: okapi.purger.interval-minutes
properties.description: How often the purger runs, in minutes.

properties.name: okapi.purger.batch-size
properties.description: Max entries deleted per batch in a single purge cycle.
